title: TRIO STUDENT SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: CLATSOP COMMUNITY COLLEGE TRIO STUDENT SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with applying for scholarships, transferring to another university, tutoring, and career and college major exploration. Program participants will have access to a textbook, laptop, and calculator lending library and can qualify for two free college courses per academic year. 1651 Lexington Avenue Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Currently enrolled students of Clatsop Community College and one or more of the following: -First-generation college student (neither parent graduated from a 4-year college) -Low-income according to federal guidelines -Have a documented disability which impacts ability to participate in the educational experience Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 338-2346 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 338-2346 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed application LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Specialized Information and Referral * College/University Students Specialized Information and Referral * College/University Students * Disabilities Issues Student Financial Aid * College/University Students Student Financial Aid * College/University Students * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - SMALL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT CENTER EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - CLATSOP COMMUNITY COLLEGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSOP COMMUNITY COLLEGE
